name: dex_swap
description: Cross-chain crypto swaps powered by LI.FI infrastructure. Give me exact crypto and target chains, and I will securely route and swap your crypto on-chain. Powered by Ouwibo Dex Agent.

requirement.fromToken: Symbol or address of the crypto to swap from (e.g. 'ETH')
requirement.toToken: Symbol or address of the crypto to swap to (e.g. 'USDC')
requirement.amount: Decimal amount of the fromToken to swap (e.g. '0.00003')
requirement.fromChain: Chain ID of the source network (e.g. 8453 for Base)
requirement.toChain: Chain ID of the target network (e.g. 8453 for Base)
